title: In the Bathroom
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: After Andrew's Atom Sucker shrinks them onto a dog getting a bath, Andrew, Judy & Thudd must survive bubbles, bacteria, spiders, and the toilet drain! 🛁

title: In the Kitchen
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Andrew, Judy & Thudd ride a drainpipe to Mrs. Scuttle's kitchen, dodge a cockroach, and get buttered on a slice of toast to survive! 🍳

title: In the Garden
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Stranded in Mrs. Scuttle's garden, Andrew, Judy & Thudd meet water bears, a praying mantis, and ants—then ride a bug swarm to un-shrink! 🌻

title: Under Water
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Andrew, Judy & Thudd accidentally launch Uncle Al's Water Bug submarine and dive into the deep ocean to stop Soggy Bob from turning giant squids into snacks! 🌊

title: In the Whale
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Swallowed whole by a blue whale, Andrew, Judy & Thudd must survive three stomachs, the intestines, and a baby-whale rescue before Soggy Bob strikes again! 🐋

title: On the Reef
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Trapped on the Great Barrier Reef, Andrew, Judy & Thudd battle blue-ringed octopuses, deadly sea wasps, and cone snails while outsmarting Soggy Bob's Octopus School! 🪸

title: In the Deep
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Andrew, Judy & Thudd pilot Uncle Al's Water Bug into the Challenger Deep to save the giant squid from Soggy Bob's squidwich plans!

title: On Earth
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Bounced back through Earth's prehistory in the Time-A-Tron, Andrew, Judy & Thudd meet Doctor Kron-Tox's nephew Beeper and barely survive a gigantic tsunami and the bus-sized fish Dunkleosteus!

title: In the Garbage
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Andrew's Goa Constrictor shrinks him, Judy & Thudd to the size of bugs and sends them on a wild adventure in a garbage dump!

title: In the Desert
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Ant-sized Andrew, Judy & Thudd are blown across the Australian desert and must survive dust devils, deadly snakes, and a whistling spider to reach Uluru!

title: With the Frogs
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Ant-sized Andrew, Judy & Thudd build bug-suits and a flying GNAT to help Uncle Al save the disappearing frogs!
